title: hieracium neyranum subsp. grausonicum
intro: Hieracium neyranum subsp. grausonicum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, a type of flowering plant commonly known as hawkweed. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium neyranum subsp. grausonicum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and potentially help alleviate symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
